name: Teheca Prepared Mama Bag
description: This kit contains the necessary supplies for a safe birth.

taxonomy.sub_category: Teheca Prepared Mama Bag Updated on September 27, 2024 · Created on August 2, 2019 Teheca Prepared Mama Bag This kit contains the necessary supplies for a safe birth. Developed By Teheca Limited Tested By Teheca Prepared Mama Bag Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description The Teheca Prepared Mama Bag is a safe birth kit that has the required items for safe and clean delivery. Mothers can purchase the birth kit and bring it to the hospital. Target Countries Uganda Target SDGs SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Market Suggested Retail Price $17.50 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Community, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises Distributors / Implementing Organizations Teheca Limited, Ugandan Ministry of Health Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Janma Clean Birth Kit . Countries Uganda Manufacturing/Building Method The kit is put together by Teheca Limited, a company based in Uganda. Intellectural Property Type Select Type User Provision Model The kit can be purchased through the Teheca website. The Ugandan government funds the production of MAAMA kits to be provided free to mothers who deliver at government facilities. Distributions to Date Status Unknown Guide type provided Manual for family preparedness Shelf life (years) Unknown Six 'cleans' covered (Y/N) Yes Surgical components Surgical blades, surgical gloves Units per package 1 Design Specifications The kit is packaged in a locally made bag and includes: Cotton wool Surgical blade Cord ties Surgical gloves 2 plastic sheets Soap Diaper Technical Support Teheca provides a number of support services including: Maternal Health Education, Pre and Post Natal care days SMS Reminders, TeleMedicine Services, and Micro-cluster postnatal services. The company can also be contacted here. Replacement Components The Prepared Mama Plus can be purchased for 27 USD and contains additional components, including: gauze, normal Saline water, a cotton towel, an extra pairs of gloves, a pack of diapers, and baby receivers. Lifecycle Most of the products in the kit can only be used once, as they are disposable. The multipurpose bag can be used as a light baby bag after delivery. Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters The company aims to increase uptake of postnatal care services through their products and services. Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety This kit is designed to increase safety and cleanliness during delivery. However the kit is not designed to replace a doctor or midwife's care. Mothers should still seek medical assistance for delivery. Complementary Technical Systems Prepared Mama Plus Academic Research and References There is no academic research on the Teheca kit at this time. The International Journal of Gynecology and Obstetrics has the following article on safe birth kits: Gerein, N., Mayhew, S., Lubben, M., 2003, A Framework for a New Approach to Antenatal Care , International Journal of Gynecology & Obstetrics, 80(2), pp. 175–182.
